description_long: This is a rectangular box of Meridion brand artisanal cookies, featuring a predominantly white and dark brown color scheme. The front and top faces display the brand name 'MERIDION' in bold white letters, along with images of chocolate chip cookies and descriptive text. The box is made of cardboard and is likely filled with individually packed or loose cookies inside. One side of the box shows a barcode, while the other side provides additional product information and images of the cookies. The packaging is sleek and modern, with clear branding and product imagery, making it visually appealing for display in urban retail environments.
description: A rectangular Meridion artisanal cookie box with bold branding, cookie images, and a white and brown color scheme.
description_view_0: Front view showing the 'MERIDION' brand name, cookie images, and product description on a white and brown background.
description_view_1: Side view displaying a barcode and the edge of the box, with minimal branding visible.
description_view_2: Back view featuring additional product information, cookie images, and branding on a white and brown background.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with the 'MERIDION' brand name and a plain brown background.
attribute_brand_logo: The 'MERIDION' brand logo is visible on the front, top, and side faces of the box, consisting of bold white uppercase letters on a dark brown background.
attribute_flavor_indication: Images of chocolate chip cookies and the word 'CHOCOLATE' on the back indicate a chocolate flavor.
attribute_nutritional_labeling: Nutritional labeling is visible on the back of the box, including calorie and ingredient information.
